content: Phase 1: Get integration playbooks (Emergent LLM, API-Football research)
Phase 1: Create POC script (test_core.py) - API-Football + normalization + LLM + fallback
Phase 1: Run POC and fix until producing valid pick JSON or 'no value' message
Phase 1: All POC user stories validated
Phase 2: Backend implementation (auth, ingestion, analyst engine, endpoints)
Phase 2: Frontend implementation (dark sportsbook UI, ES/EN, all pages)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 2: End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 (19/20 passed, only LLM budget issue)
Phase 2: Fix all reported issues - no code issues found, only Emergent LLM budget exceeded
